name: sprintmind-ai
description: SprintMind AI - Plan. Track. Summarize. Automate.

scripts.install:all: npm install --workspaces --include-workspace-root && python -m pip install -r apps/api/requirements-dev.txt
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace @sprintmind/web && python -m pytest apps/api/tests
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace @sprintmind/web && python -m ruff check apps/api/app apps/api/tests
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @sprintmind/web && python -m mypy apps/api/app
scripts.format: npm run format --workspace @sprintmind/web && python -m ruff format apps/api/app apps/api/tests
